title: Chapter 33

And now I’m only in danger of myself.” She said it softly, and I knew she didn’t want to admit it, maybe didn’t even want me to hear it. “Dollface,” I tightened her grip on the handle. “Do you feel that? Then she saw the roses on it. “Someone get those for you?” “I’ve had them delivered daily since the cabin.
